rationale: The cited paper is used for more than a passing literature list mention. In the posttest method, the authors explicitly state they measure reader outcomes "following prior research (Grewal and Stephen 2019)," indicating direct borrowing of how review-reader responses (e.g., product interest/helpfulness) are operationalized. They also cite it when discussing credibility cues in reviews, so the citation supports both methodological setup and interpretation context, even though it is not the core theoretical base of the incentive mechanism.
relation_description: The citing paper applies elements of Grewal and Stephen (2019) to its own review-reader assessment, using that work as a precedent for measuring downstream reader responses. It also draws on the cited study as evidence that review credibility cues influence consumer reactions.
